enchantment.menagerie.arcane.desc: Adds magic damage to the weapon proportional to the weapon's attack damage
enchantment.menagerie.bracer.desc: Allows the Punch-Up Star to block incoming attacks when holding right-click
enchantment.menagerie.condensed.desc: Doubles the knockback of the Spoon's charge attack
enchantment.menagerie.charger.desc: Allows the Punch-Up Star to dash with strength proportional to your current combo when pressing right-click
enchantment.menagerie.implosion.desc: Turns the Punch-Up Star's Combo Punch into an explosion with strength proportional to your current combo
enchantment.menagerie.pogo.desc: Replaces the Spoon's charge attack with a pogo ability. Throws you the opposite direction of where you're looking
message.menagerie.ability_locked: The Eye cannot sense presences when locked onto a Target
message.menagerie.mark_failure: Thy Soul cannot Split in Twain

painting.menagerie.ether.title: Ether
